pi_items.source: Drupal configuration entity naming convention and EntityViewDisplay documentation. Format: core.entity_view_display.{entity_type}.{bundle}.{view_mode}
Drupal Commerce product variation entity follows standard EntityViewDisplay naming convention: core.entity_view_display.{entity_type}.{bundle}.{view_mode}

Drupal Commerce product entity includes base fields: 'stores' (array of store references), 'uid' (entity owner/author), and 'created' (creation timestamp). All documented in Drupal 8+ Entity API and Commerce 2.x+ specifications

Drupal EntityViewDisplay supports field label values including 'hidden' (removes label for all users), 'above', and 'inline'. The body field can be added to Drupal Commerce products via helper function commerce_product_add_body_field() and its label configured to 'hidden'

Drupal core Image module provides three default image styles: 'thumbnail', 'medium', and 'large'. These are standard in all Drupal installations including Drupal 10.x used in this Commerce environment. The 'large' style is a built-in default

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Drupal Commerce product and product variation entity view displays. The configuration names follow Drupal's standard naming convention: 'core.entity_view_display.commerce_product.default.default' for the Product entity and 'core.entity_view_display.commerce_product_variation.default.default' for Product Variations. The hidden fields 'stores', 'uid', and 'created' are confirmed base fields in Drupal Commerce products. The 'body' field label is set to 'hidden' in product display configuration. The 'large' image style is a standard default image style in Drupal's core Image module, used for product variation image display.
